_comment: Scoped TypeScript mutation testing, the frontend twin of src-tauri/mutants.toml (see that file's header for the philosophy). Mutates ONLY high-value pure-logic modules with real branching and solid unit tests — not the whole app, most of which is React/Tauri glue that mutation testing can't meaningfully evaluate from jsdom. Run weekly + on demand via .github/workflows/mutation.yml (ts-mutants job); non-blocking signal source, not a gate. Local run: pnpm mutation:ts (or narrow it: pnpm mutation:ts -- --mutate src/lib/lintEngine/linter.ts). Widen scope by appending globs to `mutate` once the current scope's kill rate is healthy.
